task_objective: WeChat Moments Private Domain Copy - Transform input image into 3 persona-based朋友圈 posts with comment section script, Chinese-primary

source_image.focus: Visual elements, lifestyle scene details, product features suitable for soft-implant, scarcity signals
source_image.role: Provide visual references for private domain monetization copy

workflow.step_1: Extract lifestyle scene details from image, identify soft-implant opportunities for natural product mention
workflow.step_2: Generate 3 persona-based posts: real user / lifestyle vibe / honest seller, each under 6 lines, ultra-colloquial
workflow.step_3: Output structured copy with matching comment section script for scarcity & conversion

outputs.post_1: Real User / Asked-Bombarded - Create social heat & herd mentality. Max 6 lines, ultra-colloquial
outputs.post_2: Lifestyle Vibe / Atmosphere - High-end feel, emotional value, casual flex. Max 6 lines, ultra-colloquial
outputs.post_3: Honest Seller / Insider Reveal - Professional, source advantage, heartfelt. Max 6 lines, ultra-colloquial
outputs.comment_script: Staged comment sequence: [1st comment] VIP priority tease + [1hr later] scarcity urgency update

output_requirements: Output ONLY the final structured copy, no analysis, no reasoning
ALL selling points MUST be grounded in actual image content - never fabricate
Post body: max 6 lines, ultra-colloquial, must feel like real personal sharing NOT advertisement
Anti-fold formatting: proper paragraph breaks, whitespace, minimal precise Emoji, NO text walls
Comment script must create scarcity & urgency naturally, self-Q&A format
Tone: authentic, human, like chatting with friends - zero commercial feel in main post
Language: Chinese-primary, extreme colloquial, everyday speech patterns
